# Charles Wood — UX Designer
Senior Product Designer with a mechanical engineering background (CSWP,
FEA/CFD/CAD, Manufacturing Engineering Technology degree). Pivoted from
mechanical engineering to UX in 2019. ~10 years of combined
technical-product experience. Specializing in data products, enterprise
complexity, and AI-native design workflows.

## Enum — Medici Land Governance
Role: Sole UX designer
Dual tablet/web land-administration platform built for Zambia's national
census. Field capture interface for enumerators (tablet, offline-capable)
and office verification interface for officials (web). Research conducted
with stakeholders up to ministerial level. Deployed nationally.
Demonstrates: enterprise complexity, ambiguous brief, expert-user
research, dual-interface systems, ownership from concept through
deployment.

## Cashew — Payments platform / design system demonstration
Role: Sole designer
Text-message-based payment app for local service businesses. Primary
vehicle for demonstrating design system architecture and AI-native
workflow. Three-tier token system (primitives → semantic → component)
with an integrated Figma-to-code pipeline using Tokens Studio, Style
Dictionary, and Storybook.
Demonstrates: design system authorship, token architecture, engineering
collaboration, AI-assisted design (Figma Make).

## Trader — Stock trading journal dashboard
Role: Sole designer
Data-dense dashboard for tracking and journaling stock trades.
Demonstrates comfort with numeric, expert-user interfaces and
high-information-density data products.

## Background
- Degree: Manufacturing Engineering Technology
- Certifications: CSWP (Certified SolidWorks Professional)
- Engineering experience: FEA, CFD, CAD
- Design tools: Figma, Tokens Studio, Style Dictionary, Storybook
- Development: React, Vite, Vercel
- AI tools: Claude, Figma Make
